summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 1336

core_modules.description: Top-level SciPy namespace and public API bootstrap; exposes package-wide utilities and lazy access to subpackages.
Dense linear algebra façade over LAPACK/BLAS-backed implementations.
Optimization/root-finding hub with local/global, constrained/unconstrained, and least-squares solvers.
Numerical integration for quadrature and ODE initial/boundary value problems.
1D/ND interpolation, splines, and scattered/regular-grid interpolation utilities.
Sparse matrix core types and constructors with IO/helpers.
Sparse linear solvers, iterative methods, eigensolvers, and matrix functions.
Signal processing primitives including filtering, spectral analysis, and LTI systems.
Probability distributions, hypothesis tests, resampling, and descriptive statistics.
Modern FFT interface with backend dispatch support.
Special functions and transcendental/statistical function building blocks.
Computational geometry, nearest neighbors, and distance computations.
